name: Plum Brandy
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove pits from the plums.
2. Place all ingredients in a medium glass bowl.
3. Heat on POWER LEVEL 7 (Medium-High) for 10 minutes, stirring once to ensure the sugar is dissolved.
4. Reduce heat to POWER LEVEL 1 (Warm) and continue cooking for an additional 30 minutes, stirring twice more.
5. Cover and let stand for 3 to 4 days.
6. Strain before using.
YIELD: 2 cups
